use_cases: Displaying cryptocurrency market statistics including total market cap and change percentage on trading dashboards
Visualizing market trends through animated sparkline charts showing historical price movements
Tracking Bitcoin and altcoin dominance with visual progress bars
Showing top cryptocurrency prices with real-time change indicators
Building crypto analytics and portfolio tracking interfaces
ai_summary: A comprehensive cryptocurrency dashboard card component that displays market statistics including total market cap, animated sparkline charts for trend visualization, Bitcoin dominance metrics with visual progress bars, and a ranked list of top coins with pricing and change indicators. Uses framer-motion for smooth animations and follows a modern gradient/flat design aesthetic suitable for fintech and crypto trading platforms.
